channel.title: Japanese on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Japanese on yexca'Blog

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "こんなに素晴らしい世界で"
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Thoughts on Music Series Song Title Translation Link 僕が死のうと思ったのは I Once Thought I’d Rather Die https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/214 あくあ色ぱれっと Aqua-Colored Palette https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/219 恋の押し売り Love Push-Selling https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/220 17さいのうた Song of a 17-Year-Old https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/224 drop omit https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/230 生きるを選んだ私へ To the Me Who Chose to Live …

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "rainy lady"
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Considering this series doesn’t seem to offer much actual help for “Japanese Learning” and is publicly searchable, I’ve renamed the series to better reflect its current state. Basically, these are mostly my personal reflections on music. The lyric translations follow my own interpretation (how I felt when I heard them) and might not perfectly align with the original text. Thoughts on Music Series Song Title Translation …
